stemHtml: Approaching the Top of Climb (TOC) on an IFR flight, a pilot suffers a total loss of communications. The aircraft is currently in VMC conditions. What will be the next course of action?

options.a: Continue to fly in VMC or IMC, proceed to land at an aerodrome that provides radar services.
options.b: Continue to fly in VMC, proceed to land at the destination aerodrome and report the arrival to the appropriate Air Traffic Services unit as soon as possible.
options.c: Continue to fly the flight planned route, hold at the initial approach fix until the estimated approach time, then proceed to commence an instrument approach at the destination aerodrome.
options.d: Continue to fly in VMC, proceed to land at the nearest suitable aerodrome and report the arrival to the appropriate Air Traffic Services unit as soon as possible.
